title: What tune would you kill the characters to
display_title: What tune would you kill the characters to
wikitext:
[]: What tune would you kill the characters to?             Quote Post by Heinkel » Thu May 14, 2009 8:59 pm I know, it's a bit of a silly question. I just saw EoE. I've always loved musical endings... Metropolis, Dr. Strangelove... and End of Evangelion delivered a nice musical part (which I consider the ending since the movie basically deconstructs from then on), in which the movie decides to commit its own little genocide on the good ol' cast with the help of Lilith. The part is well-done and all, and I liked the song. A bit* depressing, but liked it nonetheless. However, the lyrics aren't quite fitting. For what I know the song deals with suicide, and what was on-screen was mass liquefaction rather than suicide. So, the question is, what song would you have chosen for that sequence? Keeping the meaning of the scene, so "Hand of Doom" or "Indestructible" don't count. *read: very depressing.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Thu May 14, 2009 10:06 pm very cool idea hein :) since i'm listening to this... sounds like they say before i explodes or something, so it fits with the tanging

[]:             Quote Post by backseatjesus » Thu May 14, 2009 10:09 pm I would kill the entire cast of Evangelion to Tiny Tim's version of Livin' In The Sunlight, Lovin' In The Moonlight.

[]:             Quote Post by Baz » Thu May 14, 2009 10:12 pm I'm also a fan of the Metropolis ending. For Evangelion, how about playing Louis Armstrong's What a Wonderful World while the red tide sweeps over everything. Just to give more weight to what's being lost and all that.

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Thu May 14, 2009 10:12 pm Frontier Psychiatrist by The Avalanches. Just seems like it'd be hilariously.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Thu May 14, 2009 10:23 pm some guy already put Shinji to that

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Thu May 14, 2009 10:28 pm widely different, but each is appropriate in its own way: Queen, One Vision Enigma, The Return to Innocence Manic Street Preachers, Everything Must Go Sarah McLachlan, World on Fire Pink Floyd, Goodbye Blue Sky Nightwish, Bless the Child

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Thu May 14, 2009 10:36 pm Axell wrote: some guy already put Shinji to that

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Thu May 14, 2009 10:52 pm Why So Serious?

[]:             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Thu May 14, 2009 11:55 pm Short People - Randy Newman If you think this doesn't have context, go to Japan and don't be surprised if you suddenly feel taller for it.

[]:             Quote Post by Fast Tony DeNiro » Fri May 15, 2009 1:50 am NemZ wrote: widely different, but each is appropriate in it's own way: Pink Floyd, Goodbye Blue Sky

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Fri May 15, 2009 9:57 am Jesu - Silver Except everything would have to be in slow motion throughout the song.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Fri May 15, 2009 11:58 am I'd kill Rei to Still Alive I'd kill Ritsuko to Code Monkey . Both songs are by Johnathon Coulton. I'd kill Shinji to Scatman's World . Just for the "lols" I'd kill Asuka to 99 Luft Balloons . Either the rock version or the original version by Nena. I'd kill Gendo to He's Got the Whole World in His Hands . I'd kill Misato to Beer is Good!(and stuff) I'd kill Kaworu to the Brokeback Mountain theme. I'd kill Makoto to a creepy carnival song. I'd kill Aoba to some instrumental guitar song. I'd kill Pen Pen to Eat it by "Weird" Al Yankovic I'd kill Toji to the Rocky theme. I'd kill Kensuke to The Terminator theme. I'd kill Hikari to Fly Me to the Moon . I wouldn't kill Maya though.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Fri May 15, 2009 12:15 pm It would be massive carnage and mayhem to this

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Fri May 15, 2009 12:33 pm Someone did a not so good video of that

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Fri May 15, 2009 1:28 pm Pink Floyd-Comfortably Numb Pink Floyd-What Shall we do Now? Pink Floyd-Run Like Hell Korn-Another Brick in the Wall (Pt. 1-3) David Gilmour-All Lovers Are Deranged David Gilmour-Murder David Gilmour-Let's Get Metaphysical Guns N' Roses Medley Roger Waters-What God Wants (Pt. 1-3) Roger Waters-Watching TV Roger Waters-Amused to Death Martin O'Donnell (Halo 3 soundtrack)-Never Forget (^best one IMO^) THIS should be the EoE/3.0/4.0 soundtrack, it would be so much MOAR awesomer I'll let you all speculate as to who dies to what, but IMNSHO this would be the best

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri May 15, 2009 2:32 pm There can only be one answer, and it was already used in the last episode of The Prisoner -- "All you need is love".

[]:             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Sat May 16, 2009 2:48 am I'd put them all out of their miseries to Institutionalized by Suicidal Tendencies.

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Sat May 16, 2009 6:53 am It would be amusing from my point of view for EoE to be sped up 4x, then having the chicken song being out on full blast. When you think about it, it's pretty funny. Oh yeah, and all those circus-related songs LOL. Any random sad song would pretty much do...

[]:             Quote Post by GaijinOtaku » Sat May 16, 2009 3:00 pm I have never thuoght about this before. Honestly, I can't think of an answer, because I can't think of any characters I would enjoy killing.
